ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the district is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the district is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the district */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the school */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of school (public, private, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_data" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the enrollment record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment data */,
  "total_p1_boys" INTEGER /* Total boys enrolled in P1 */,
  "total_p1_girls" INTEGER /* Total girls enrolled in P1 */,
  "total_p2_boys" INTEGER /* Total boys enrolled in P2 */,
  "total_p2_girls" INTEGER /* Total girls enrolled in P2 */,
  "total_p3_boys" INTEGER /* Total boys enrolled in P3 */,
  "total_p3_girls" INTEGER /* Total girls enrolled in P3 */,
  "total_p4_boys" INTEGER /* Total boys enrolled in P4 */,
  "total_p4_girls" INTEGER /* Total girls enrolled in P4 */,
  "total_p5_boys" INTEGER /* Total boys enrolled in P5 */,
  "total_p5_girls" INTEGER /* Total girls enrolled in P5 */,
  "total_p6_boys" INTEGER /* Total boys enrolled in P6 */,
  "total_p6_girls" INTEGER /* Total girls enrolled in P6 */,
  "total_p7_boys" INTEGER /* Total boys enrolled in P7 */,
  "total_p7_girls" INTEGER /* Total girls enrolled in P7 */,
  "total_boys_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total boys enrollment across all grades */,
  "total_girls_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total girls enrollment across all grades */,
  "total_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment across all grades */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_data_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the teacher */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the district */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Name of the teacher */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the teacher (male/female) */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Teacher's qualifications (degree, etc.) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Teacher's specialization (subject, etc.) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Teacher's years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the facility record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the school */,
  "has_water_source" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is a water source available (TRUE/FALSE) */,
  "has_power_source" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school is connected to a power source (TRUE/FALSE) */,
  "number_of_toilets_boys" INTEGER /* Count of toilet stalls for boys */,
  "number_of_toilets_girls" INTEGER /* Count of toilet stalls for girls */,
  "has_sickbay" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is a sickbay available (TRUE/FALSE) */,
  "has_playfield" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is a playfield available (TRUE/FALSE) */,
  "has_mid_day_meals" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school provides mid-day meals (TRUE/FALSE) */,
  "has_talking_compound" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school has a talking compound (TRUE/FALSE) */,
  "has_library" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is a library available (TRUE/FALSE) */,
  "has_staffroom" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is a staff room (TRUE/FALSE) */,
  "total_number_of_classrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of classrooms in the school */,
  "holds_class_day" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school holds class days (TRUE/FALSE) */,
  "holds_sports_day" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school holds sports days (TRUE/FALSE) */,
  "holds_mdd" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school holds MDD (Multi-Disciplinary Day) (TRUE/FALSE) */,
  "classroom_size" INTEGER /* Average size of classrooms in the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_facilities_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the enrollment record */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject being assessed */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade achieved by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollment_data ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stats record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the school */,
  "total_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment across all schools in the district */,
  "average_classroom_size" REAL /* Average classroom size in the district */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Student-teacher ratio in the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_stats_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yearly_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the review record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the review */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the district */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Notes and assessments derived from the year's statistics */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for the district based on the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_reviews_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)
